name: a framework that has its own namespace resolves as present and activates that namespace
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/resolve-technology.sh" React 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'r=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); exit(r["specific"]["status"]=="present" && r["specific"]["namespace"]=="react" && r["activated_namespaces"].include?("react") ? 0:1)' && echo present-activates-specific 1>&2
